articles.title: Decade-long warming accelerates antibiotic resistance in grassland soils
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 22 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10413-xDecade-long warming increased soil antibiotic-resistance genes by about 24%, enriching resistant microbes and gene transfer, driven by selection for thermal tolerance and linked traits, with implications for public health.
